theorem: G1 structural: (i) g=y path forces pure y^d via deg R_x = d-1 > deg L_x; (ii) Poisson nontrivial ker only for pure powers; (iii) K=0 non-pure + free mid has no Keller solutions through dmax; (iv) pure powers admit axis realization. Together: plane Keller leading is pure power (machine through dmax + degree-gap identity for the g=y / K=0 first-component path).
